'''Harlequin Station''' was a [[Bengel Shipbuilders]] [[XQ1 Platform]] located in the [[Garis sector/Legends|Garis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was a trade center making business with the [[Azzameen Station/Legends|Azzameen Station]].

==History==
It was the trading outpost to where [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] delivered his first cargo as a pilot working for his family's business, shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. During the delivery, a pair of [[Pursuer-class enforcement ship|''Pursuer''-class enforcement ships]] named the ''[[Enkidu]]'' and ''[[Gilgam]]'' and in the employ of [[Viraxo Industries|Viraxo Shipping]] attempted to attack the station. Azzameen helped fend off the attack and was rewarded a key to the station from the outpost's [[Mayor/Legends|Mayor]] [[Brauken]].

[[File:Harlequin_Key.jpg|thumb|left|The award presented to [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].]]

While the reason for the attack is unclear, it is known that [[K'Armyn Viraxo]] used intimidation tactics in order to further his business interests. It is presumed that he had bought off the [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|System Patrol Craft]] ''[[Kouerd]]'' that abandoned ''Harlequin Station'' as soon as the raiders exited hyperspace.

This skirmish was the origin of the feud between Ace Azzameen and the Viraxo (particularly the ''Enkidu''), although the [[Azzameen family]] had already been business rivals for a time prior to this.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
